message:
Remove redundant OCSF sync workflow

The workflow would never create PRs because all generated OCSF files
are gitignored. OCSF documentation is regenerated during every CI
build via pnpm generate:ocsf:all, making this daily sync redundant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,46 +0,0 @@
-name: Sync OCSF Reference
-
-on:
-  schedule:
-    - cron: "0 6 * * *" # Daily at 6:00 UTC
-  workflow_dispatch:
-
-permissions:
-  contents: write
-  pull-requests: write
-
-jobs:
-  sync:
-    name: Sync OCSF Schema
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    steps:
-      - name: Checkout repository
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
-
-      - name: Install pnpm
-        run: npm install -g pnpm
-
-      - name: Setup Node.js
-        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
-        with:
-          node-version: "20"
-          cache: "pnpm"
-
-      - name: Install dependencies
-        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
-
-      - name: Generate OCSF reference
-        run: pnpm generate:ocsf --all
-
-      - name: Create Pull Request
-        uses: peter-evans/create-pull-request@v5
-        with:
-          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
-          commit-message: "Update OCSF reference to latest schema"
-          title: "Update OCSF reference to latest schema"
-          body: |
-            This PR updates the OCSF reference documentation to the latest schema version.
-
-            Auto-generated by the daily sync workflow.
-          branch: update-ocsf-reference
-          delete-branch: true
